stream_summary: Extend StepDefinition and DevinWrapper classes to support per-step agent configurations. This is the foundation workstream that enables all other work.

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step definition can include optional 'agent_config' field pointing to a config file
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json with 'agent_config': 'agent-config.json', When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses that config file

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: If step has no agent_config, fall back to global .devin/agent-config.json
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step.json without 'agent_config' field, When the step is executed, Then DevinWrapper uses .devin/agent-config.json

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: DevinWrapper receives agent-config path and passes it to Devin CLI
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step with agent_config field, When DevinWrapper.build_devin_command() is called, Then the command includes --agent-config <path>

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Step-specific agent-config is resolved relative to step directory
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step in steps/my-step/ with agent_config: 'agent-config.json', When the path is resolved, Then it resolves to steps/my-step/agent-config.json

related_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Absolute paths in agent_config are supported
related_acceptance_criteria.gherkin: Given a step with agent_config: '/absolute/path/agent-config.json', When the path is resolved, Then it uses the absolute path

related_edge_cases.criterion: Given agent_config: '', When step executes, Then global config is used
Given agent_config: null, When step executes, Then global config is used
Given agent_config: '../other-step/agent-config.json', When resolved, Then it points to correct location

related_edge_cases.case: Both step-specific and global config exist
related_edge_cases.criterion: Given both configs exist, When step executes, Then step-specific config is used

stream_steps.title: Extend StepDefinition Class
stream_steps.description: Add agent_config field to StepDefinition and implement path resolution
tasks: Add agent_config field to __init__() - extract from data dict
Handle empty/null values - treat as not specified
Support both relative and absolute paths
acceptance_criteria: StepDefinition accepts agent_config field from step.json
get_agent_config_path() returns None if agent_config not specified
Relative paths resolve to step directory
Empty/null values treated as not specified
artifacts_produced: Modified orchestrator/devin_wrapper.py with extended StepDefinition class

stream_steps.title: Update DevinWrapper.build_devin_command()
stream_steps.description: Modify command building to use step-specific config if available
tasks: Fall back to global config if not specified
acceptance_criteria: DevinWrapper uses step-specific config if available
Falls back to global config if agent_config not specified
Path is correctly resolved before passing to CLI
artifacts_produced: Modified orchestrator/devin_wrapper.py with updated DevinWrapper class

relevant_context.relevance: Defines saga orchestration architecture and DevinWrapper responsibilities
Current implementation that needs to be extended
Current hardcoded --agent-config flag that needs to be updated
Existing pattern for path resolution relative to step directory

success_criteria: StepDefinition class accepts and stores agent_config field
Path resolution works for relative and absolute paths
DevinWrapper uses step-specific config if available
Fallback to global config works correctly
All code follows existing patterns and style
notes: This workstream is the foundation for all other work. Must be completed before validation and testing workstreams can proceed.
